core_mechanism: an exact large-parameter (large-N) duality that resums the full order-by-order expansion of one system's observable into an equivalent dual description, with the observable re-expressed as a generating function whose coefficients are integer-valued state-counting invariants
brief_reason: The abstract establishes that a gauge-side observable agrees to all orders in N with the corresponding quantity on the dual string side and reformulates the invariant in terms of new integral invariants capturing a discrete spectrum of states, i.e. a large-N duality plus a generating-function-into-integer-counting-invariants reorganization.
